entry.title: Re: Streamlining User Management in Advanced Event Mesh with SAP CIS and Identity Federation
entry.content: Nice! Thanks for sharing!

entry.title: 🇮🇳 SAP CodeJam: Connecting systems and services using SAP Integration Suite (Mumbai, India)
entry.content:
REGISTRATION FOR THIS EVENT:  We will send confirmation emails two weeks before the event. You can still register, and you will be added to a waitlist if the maximum capacity is reached. 

This SAP CodeJam instance will be about SAP Integration Suite and how we can use it to connect systems and services in our landscape. Join us for this 5-hour event of developer networking and hands-on learning in Mumbai, India.

We will achieve an integration scenario like the one below in the diagram by the end of the CodeJam.

 

If you are interested in what we will develop during the event, check out the Connecting Systems and Services using SAP Integration Suite CodeJam GitHub repo -  https://github.com/SAP-samples/connecting-systems-services-integration-suite-codejam. The repository contains the details of the integration scenario we will use during the event.

This is a free hands-on, in-person event only (not virtual) and takes place Monday, the 14th of July, in Mumbai, India at Colgate Research Centre, Main St, Hiranandani Gardens, Sainath Nagar, Powai, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400076. The event is kindly being hosted by Colgate, thank you! 

The instructors are Developer Advocates @ajay_soreng and @ajmaradiaga.

Every attendee must complete essential prerequisites before arriving at the event location. You can find the prerequisites here: https://github.com/SAP-samples/connecting-systems-services-integration-suite-codejam/blob/main/prerequisites.md.

If you wish to attend, please indicate that using the "I'm attending" facility on this page. Please note that spaces are limited - we can only accommodate 30 attendees for this event. In that context, if you indicate that you're attending and later realise you can't, please remove your name so that others get a chance instead. Thanks!

Location: Colgate Research Centre, Main St, Hiranandani Gardens, Sainath Nagar, Powai, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400076

entry.title: 🇮🇳 Event-driven integrations with SAP Integration Suite, advanced event mesh #1 (Hyderabad, India)
entry.content:
REGISTRATION FOR THIS EVENT:  We will send confirmation emails two weeks before the event. You can still register, and you will be added to a waitlist if the maximum capacity is reached. 

This SAP CodeJam instance will be about Event-driven integration using SAP Integration Suite, advanced event mesh. Join us for this 6-hour event of developer networking and hands-on learning in Hyderabad, India.

This is the first of two CodeJams that we will do on the event-driven integration topic in Hyderabad.

We will achieve an integration scenario like the one in the diagram below by the end of the CodeJam.

If you are interested in knowing what we will develop during the event, check out the Event-Driven Integrations with SAP Integration Suite, Advanced Event Mesh GitHub repo -  https://github.com/SAP-samples/event-driven-integrations-codejam. The repository contains the details of the integration scenario we will go through during the event.

This free, hands-on, in-person event (not virtual) will take place on Tuesday, July 15th 2025, in WeWork Krishe Emerald, Kondapur Main Road, Laxmi Cyber City, Whitefields, Kondapur, Hyderabad, Telangana, India. The event is kindly being hosted by Mindset Consulting, thank you!

The instructors for this event are Developer Advocate @ajay_soreng and @ajmaradiaga 

There are essential prerequisites that every attendee must complete before arriving at the event location. You can find the prerequisites here: https://github.com/SAP-samples/event-driven-integrations-codejam/blob/main/prerequisites.md.

If you wish to attend, please indicate that using the "Yes" button in the Will you be attending? box on this page.

Location: WeWork Krishe Emerald, Kondapur Main Road, Laxmi Cyber City, Whitefields, Kondapur, Hyderabad, Telangana, India

entry.title: 🇮🇳 Event-driven integrations with SAP Integration Suite, advanced event mesh #2 (Hyderabad, India)
entry.content:
REGISTRATION FOR THIS EVENT:  We will send confirmation emails two weeks before the event. You can still register, and you will be added to a waitlist if the maximum capacity is reached. 

This SAP CodeJam instance will be about Event-driven integration using SAP Integration Suite, advanced event mesh. Join us for this 6-hour event of developer networking and hands-on learning in Hyderabad, India.

This is the second of two CodeJams that we will do on the event-driven integration topic in Hyderabad.

We will achieve an integration scenario like the one in the diagram below by the end of the CodeJam.

If you are interested in knowing what we will develop during the event, check out the Event-Driven Integrations with SAP Integration Suite, Advanced Event Mesh GitHub repo -  https://github.com/SAP-samples/event-driven-integrations-codejam. The repository contains the details of the integration scenario we will go through during the event.

This free, hands-on, in-person event (not virtual) will take place on Tuesday, July 16th 2025, in Infosys STP, Infosys Rd, Madhava Reddy Colony, Gachibowli, Hyderabad, Telangana 500032, India. The event is kindly being hosted by Infosys, thank you!

The instructors for this event are Developer Advocate @ajay_soreng and @ajmaradiaga 

There are essential prerequisites that every attendee must complete before arriving at the event location. You can find the prerequisites here: https://github.com/SAP-samples/event-driven-integrations-codejam/blob/main/prerequisites.md.

If you wish to attend, please indicate that using the "Yes" button in the Will you be attending? box on this page.

Location: Infosys STP, Infosys Rd, Madhava Reddy Colony, Gachibowli, Hyderabad, Telangana 500032, India

entry.title: 🇮🇳 SAP CodeJam: Connecting systems and services using SAP Integration Suite (Bengaluru, India)
entry.content:
REGISTRATION FOR THIS EVENT:  We will send confirmation emails two weeks before the event. You can still register, and you will be added to a waitlist if the maximum capacity is reached. 

This SAP CodeJam instance will be about SAP Integration Suite and how we can use it to connect systems and services in our landscape. Join us for this 5-hour event of developer networking and hands-on learning in Bengaluru, India.

We will achieve an integration scenario like the one below in the diagram by the end of the CodeJam.

 

If you are interested in what we will develop during the event, check out the Connecting Systems and Services using SAP Integration Suite CodeJam GitHub repo -  https://github.com/SAP-samples/connecting-systems-services-integration-suite-codejam. The repository contains the details of the integration scenario we will use during the event.

This is a free hands-on, in-person event only (not virtual) and takes place Friday, the 18th of July, in Bengaluru, India at Mindset Consulting, Shanthala Nagar, Ashok Nagar, Bengaluru, Karnataka, India. The event is kindly being hosted by Mindset Consulting, thank you! 

The instructors are Developer Advocates @ajay_soreng and @ajmaradiaga.

Every attendee must complete essential prerequisites before arriving at the event location. You can find the prerequisites here: https://github.com/SAP-samples/connecting-systems-services-integration-suite-codejam/blob/main/prerequisites.md.

If you wish to attend, please indicate that using the "I'm attending" facility on this page. Please note that spaces are limited - we can only accommodate 30 attendees for this event. In that context, if you indicate that you're attending and later realise you can't, please remove your name so that others get a chance instead. Thanks!

Location: Mindset Consulting, Shanthala Nagar, Ashok Nagar, Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

entry.title: SAP Integration Suite CodeJam roadshow in India
entry.content:
¡Hola SAP Developers!

I've got some exciting news to share with you. We are organising an SAP Integration Suite CodeJam roadshow in India!

I understand that in July, it is still season for the king of fruits in India (🥭 mango, obviously), and my colleague @ajay_soreng and I ( @ajmaradiaga ) will go on the hunt for the best mango variety in India... while we do a few CodeJams on our roadshow 😋.  We will have three stops on the roadshow from July 14th to 18th, 2025, doing a total of four CodeJams, one in Mumbai, two in Hyderabad, and one more in Bengaluru :-).

 

Connecting systems and services using SAP Integration Suite

This SAP CodeJam instance will be about SAP Integration Suite and how we can use it to connect systems and services in our landscape.

Event-driven integration with SAP Integration Suite, advanced event mesh

This SAP CodeJam instance will be about event-driven architectures focusing on SAP Integration Suite, advanced event mesh. During the CodeJam, we will cover different technologies/tools: SAP Integration Suite, advanced event mesh, SAP Cloud Integration, SAP Business Application Studio, CloudEvents, and Node.js.

SAP CodeJam events part of the roadshow (Register Now!)

Below is a listing of the SAP CodeJam events on the roadshow schedule:

Dates

CodeJam topic

Location

Registration

14 July

Connecting systems and services using SAP Integration Suite

Mumbai 🇮🇳

Link

15 July

Event-driven integrations with SAP Integration Suite, advanced event mesh #1

Hyderabad 🇮🇳

Link

16 July

Event-driven integrations with SAP Integration Suite, advanced event mesh #2

Hyderabad 🇮🇳

Link

18 July

Connecting systems and services using SAP Integration Suite

Bengaluru 🇮🇳

Link

Make sure to register to secure your place. It is likely that the places available will go fast. See you all somewhere in India on the roadshow!

entry.title: Re: 🇪🇸 Getting started with Generative AI Hub on SAP AI Core (Madrid, Spain)
entry.content: The invitation will be sent later today. Apologies for the delay.

entry.title: Re: 🇮🇳 SAP CodeJam: Connecting systems and services using SAP Integration Suite (Mumbai, India)
entry.content:
Note that the original address set for the event has changed, and it will now be hosted here:

Colgate Research Centre,
Main St, Hiranandani Gardens,
Sainath Nagar, Powai, Mumbai,
Maharashtra 400076

https://maps.app.goo.gl/qjSDuDoyZ6uB4cBV6

entry.title: 🇧🇷 Getting started with Generative AI Hub on SAP AI Core (São Paulo, Brazil)
entry.content:
This SAP CodeJam event is on the topic of Getting started with Generative AI Hub on SAP AI Core and Python. You do not need to have any background in the topic, but a lot of curiosity!

In this CodeJam you will learn how to use Generative AI Hub on SAP AI Core to implement a retrieval augmented generation (RAG) use case to improve the responses of large language models (LLMs) and reduce hallucinations. You will learn how to deploy an LLM and the orchestration service on SAP AI Core and query it via SAP AI Launchpad and the Python SDK. Furthermore, you will learn about the most important genAI concepts and create and use text chunks and embeddings to improve your RAG response.

This is a free in-person event and is planned for Friday, July 25th in São Paulo, Brazil 🇧🇷 from 09:30 to 14:30 local time. The language of the event and the content will be in English. The instructors are @josh_bentley and @SavioMarques from SAP.

The event is kindly being hosted by Exed Consulting in the Exed AppHaus São Paulo, thank you! Please note that spaces are limited - we can only accommodate 25 attendees. 

Prerequisites: Any Chromium-based web browser, such as Google Chrome, Microsoft Edge, etc.

Visit the SAP CodeJam group for more information on SAP CodeJam events, to ask questions, and to chat with your fellow attendees.

entry.title: 🇵🇪 Getting started with Generative AI Hub on SAP AI Core (Lima, Peru)
entry.content:
This SAP CodeJam event is on the topic of Getting started with Generative AI Hub on SAP AI Core and Python. You do not need to have any background in the topic, but a lot of curiosity!

In this CodeJam you will learn how to use Generative AI Hub on SAP AI Core to implement a retrieval augmented generation (RAG) use case to improve the responses of large language models (LLMs) and reduce hallucinations. You will learn how to deploy an LLM and the orchestration service on SAP AI Core and query it via SAP AI Launchpad and the Python SDK. Furthermore, you will learn about the most important genAI concepts and create and use text chunks and embeddings to improve your RAG response.

This is a free in-person event and is planned for Tuesday, August 5th in Lima, Peru 🇵🇪 from 09:30 to 14:30 local time. The language of the event and the content will be in English. The instructors are Developer Advocate @ajmaradiaga and @RichHeilman from SAP.

Please note that spaces are limited - we can only accommodate 25 attendees. 

Prerequisites: Any Chromium-based web browser, such as Google Chrome, Microsoft Edge, etc.

Visit the SAP CodeJam group for more information on SAP CodeJam events, to ask questions, and to chat with your fellow attendees.

entry.title: 🇲🇽 Getting started with Generative AI Hub on SAP AI Core (Mexico City, Mexico)
entry.content:
This SAP CodeJam event is on the topic of Getting started with Generative AI Hub on SAP AI Core and Python. You do not need to have any background in the topic, but a lot of curiosity!

In this CodeJam you will learn how to use Generative AI Hub on SAP AI Core to implement a retrieval augmented generation (RAG) use case to improve the responses of large language models (LLMs) and reduce hallucinations. You will learn how to deploy an LLM and the orchestration service on SAP AI Core and query it via SAP AI Launchpad and the Python SDK. Furthermore, you will learn about the most important genAI concepts and create and use text chunks and embeddings to improve your RAG response.

This is a free in-person event and is planned for Friday, August 8th in Mexico City, Mexico 🇲🇽 from 09:30 to 14:30 local time. The language of the event and the content will be in English. The instructors are Developer Advocates @ajmaradiaga, @RichHeilman, and @thomas_jung from SAP.

The event is kindly being hosted by IBM Mexico , thank you! Please note that spaces are limited - we can only accommodate 25 attendees. 

Prerequisites: Any Chromium-based web browser, such as Google Chrome, Microsoft Edge, etc.

Visit the SAP CodeJam group for more information on SAP CodeJam events, to ask questions, and to chat with your fellow attendees.

entry.title: 🇨🇴 Getting started with Generative AI Hub on SAP AI Core (Bogota, Colombia)
entry.content:
This SAP CodeJam event is on the topic of Getting started with Generative AI Hub on SAP AI Core and Python. You do not need to have any background in the topic, but a lot of curiosity!

In this CodeJam you will learn how to use Generative AI Hub on SAP AI Core to implement a retrieval augmented generation (RAG) use case to improve the responses of large language models (LLMs) and reduce hallucinations. You will learn how to deploy an LLM and the orchestration service on SAP AI Core and query it via SAP AI Launchpad and the Python SDK. Furthermore, you will learn about the most important genAI concepts and create and use text chunks and embeddings to improve your RAG response.

This is a free in-person event and is planned for Friday, August 12th in Bogota, Colombia 🇨🇴 from 09:30 to 14:30 local time. The language of the event and the content will be in English. The instructor are Developer Advocates @ajmaradiagaand @RichHeilman from SAP.

Please note that spaces are limited - we can only accommodate 25 attendees. 

Prerequisites: Any Chromium-based web browser, such as Google Chrome, Microsoft Edge, etc.

Visit the SAP CodeJam group for more information on SAP CodeJam events, to ask questions, and to chat with your fellow attendees.

entry.title: 🇵🇪 SAP CodeJam ABAP Cloud (Lima, Peru)
entry.content:
This SAP CodeJam event is on the topic of the ABAP Cloud, and specifically introduces attendees to ABAP Cloud and the ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model. ABAP Cloud is the ABAP based development model for S/4HANA Cloud, S/4HANA on premise, and SAP BTP, ABAP environment. Learn how to use proven and new technologies, such as Core Data Services (CDS) and behavior definition and implementation languages, to build SAP Fiori apps and OData services on any of the ABAP Cloud options. In this hands-on experience, developers will create their first ABAP applications using ABAP Cloud, expose and consume services via HTTP, and explore the ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model.

This is an in-person event only (not virtual) and is planned for Monday 4 August 2025 in Lima, Peru  from 09:30 - 15:30 local time. The language of the event and the content will be English.

Location: SAP Peru SAC, Av. Club Golf los Incas 154, Santiago de Surco 15023, Peru

The instructor is Developer Advocate @RichHeilman 

Here are essential prerequisites that must be completed by every attendee, before arriving at the event location. They are documented here: abap-exercises-codejam/prerequisites.md at main · SAP-samples/abap-exercises-codejam (github.com).

Please note that spaces are limited - we can only accommodate 25 attendees. Register here in the Community Event using the RSVP functionality.

For more information on SAP CodeJam events, to ask questions, and to chat with your fellow attendees, head over to the SAP CodeJam group.

entry.title: 🇲🇽 SAP CodeJam ABAP Cloud (Mexico City, Mexico)
entry.content:
This SAP CodeJam event is on the topic of the ABAP Cloud, and specifically introduces attendees to ABAP Cloud and the ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model. ABAP Cloud is the ABAP based development model for S/4HANA Cloud, S/4HANA on premise, and SAP BTP, ABAP environment. Learn how to use proven and new technologies, such as Core Data Services (CDS) and behavior definition and implementation languages, to build SAP Fiori apps and OData services on any of the ABAP Cloud options. In this hands-on experience, developers will create their first ABAP applications using ABAP Cloud, expose and consume services via HTTP, and explore the ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model.

This is an in-person event only (not virtual) and is planned for Thursday 7 August 2025 in Mexico City, Mexico  from 09:30 - 15:30 local time. The language of the event and the content will be English. 

Location: IBM México, Calle Alfonso Nápoles Gandara 3111, Col. Parque Corporativo de Peña Blanca, Delegación Álvaro Obregón, C.P. 01210

The instructor are Developer Advocates @RichHeilman and @thomas_jung.

Here are essential prerequisites that must be completed by every attendee, before arriving at the event location. They are documented here: abap-exercises-codejam/prerequisites.md at main · SAP-samples/abap-exercises-codejam (github.com).

Please note that spaces are limited - we can only accommodate 25 attendees. Register here in the Community Event using the RSVP functionality.

For more information on SAP CodeJam events, to ask questions, and to chat with your fellow attendees, head over to the SAP CodeJam group.

entry.title: 🇨🇴 SAP CodeJam ABAP Cloud (Bogota, Colombia)
entry.content:
This SAP CodeJam event is on the topic of the ABAP Cloud, and specifically introduces attendees to ABAP Cloud and the ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model. ABAP Cloud is the ABAP based development model for S/4HANA Cloud, S/4HANA on premise, and SAP BTP, ABAP environment. Learn how to use proven and new technologies, such as Core Data Services (CDS) and behavior definition and implementation languages, to build SAP Fiori apps and OData services on any of the ABAP Cloud options. In this hands-on experience, developers will create their first ABAP applications using ABAP Cloud, expose and consume services via HTTP, and explore the ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model.

This is an in-person event only (not virtual) and is planned for Monday 11 August 2025 in Bogota, Colombia  from 09:30 - 15:30 local time. The language of the event and the content will be English. 

Location: SAP Colombia S.A.S. Ak 9 #115-06, Bogotá, Colombia

The instructor is Developer Advocate @RichHeilman 

Here are essential prerequisites that must be completed by every attendee, before arriving at the event location. They are documented here: abap-exercises-codejam/prerequisites.md at main · SAP-samples/abap-exercises-codejam (github.com).

entry.title: Quedada SAP - Let's talk about Joule - Bogota 🇨🇴 #SAPCodeJamsLATAM
entry.content:
The local SAP Community in Bogota has a chance to meet after our first of two local SAP CodeJams!

Quedada SAP in Bogota will happen on August 11th, 2024 at 18:00 local time for a few hours, so join us and be a part of our Group!  You don't have to be an attendee of our SAP CodeJam events, just someone active or curious about the SAP Community and our focus on #developers

Let’s talk about what's new in the SAP world, about interesting SAP projects in the region, and what's new with ourselves.

Please let us know if you will participate in SAP Stammtisch by clicking "I will attend", at the BBC Cerveceria that's in the W Hotel @ Avenida Carrera 9 #115 - 30, Bogota 110111 Colombia.  FYI, everyone is responsible for their own to buy a food/drink item if they wish, we are just happy for the chance to connect in person and have some relaxing conversation!

Click here to find more information about the SAP Developer Advocates Latin America Roadshow

entry.title: Quedada SAP - Let's talk about Joule - Lima 🇵🇪 #SAPCodeJamsLATAM
entry.content:
The local SAP Community in Lima has a chance to meet after our first of two local SAP CodeJams!

Quedada SAP in Lima will happen on August 4th, 2024 at 18:00 local time for a few hours, so join us and be a part of our Group!  You don't have to be an attendee of our SAP CodeJam events, just someone active or curious about the SAP Community and our focus on #developers

Let’s talk about what's new in the SAP world, about interesting SAP projects in the region, and what's new with ourselves.

Please let us know if you will participate in SAP Stammtisch by clicking "I will attend", at Bar Aleman Miraflores, Av. Alfredo Benavides 511, Lima 15074, Peru.  FYI, everyone is responsible for their own to buy a food/drink item if they wish, we are just happy for the chance to connect in person and have some relaxing conversation!

Click here to find more information about the SAP Developer Advocates second Latin America Roadshow

entry.title: Quedada SAP - Let's talk about Joule - Mexico City 🇲🇽 #SAPCodeJamsLATAM
entry.content:
The local SAP Community in Mexico City has a chance to meet after our first of two local SAP CodeJams!

Quedada SAP in Mexico City will happen on August 7th, 2024 at 18:00 local time for a few hours, so join us and be a part of our Group!  You don't have to be an attendee of our SAP CodeJam events, just someone active or curious about the SAP Community and our focus on #developers

Let’s talk about what's new in the SAP world, about interesting SAP projects in the region, and what's new with ourselves.

Please let us know if you will participate in SAP Stammtisch by clicking "I will attend", we have a table reservation for 12 at Ulama, Antonio Dovali Jaime 70, Santa Fe, Zedec Sta Fé, Álvaro Obregón, 01218 Ciudad de México, CDMX, Mexico.  FYI, everyone is responsible for their own to buy a food/drink item if they wish, we are just happy for the chance to connect in person and have some relaxing conversation!

Click here to find more information about the SAP Developer Advocates second Latin America Roadshow

entry.title: SAP CodeJam Roadshow 2025 - Latin America edition 🇧🇷 🇵🇪 🇲🇽 🇨🇴 (July 25th - Aug 12th 2024)
entry.content:
¡Hola SAP Developers!

I've got some exciting news to share with you. The SAP CodeJam roadshow is coming back to Latin America! This time, Josh Bentley, Rich Heilman, Thomas Jung, and Antonio Maradiaga will be part of the second SAP CodeJam Roadshow in Latin America.  We will have four stops on the roadshow starting the 25th of July and then continuing from August 4th - 12th, 2025, doing a total of seven CodeJams, one in São Paulo and then two in Lima, Mexico City and Bogota. Also, we'll organise a couple of quedadas (meetups) as we did last year. :-).

Check out the featured guests list in each event to learn which Developer Advocate(s) will be at the different events/locations.

 

SAP CodeJam ABAP Cloud

This SAP CodeJam event is on the topic of the ABAP Cloud, and specifically introduces attendees to ABAP Cloud and the ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model. ABAP Cloud is the ABAP based development model for S/4HANA Cloud, S/4HANA on premise, and SAP BTP, ABAP environment. Learn how to use proven and new technologies, such as Core Data Services (CDS) and behavior definition and implementation languages, to build SAP Fiori apps and OData services on any of the ABAP Cloud options. In this hands-on experience, developers will create their first ABAP applications using ABAP Cloud, expose and consume services via HTTP, and explore the ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model.

Getting started with Generative AI Hub on SAP AI Core

In this CodeJam, you will learn how to use Generative AI Hub on SAP AI Core to implement a retrieval augmented generation (RAG) use case to improve the responses of large language models (LLMs) and reduce hallucinations. You will learn how to deploy an LLM and the orchestration service on SAP AI Core and query it via SAP AI Launchpad and the Python SDK. Furthermore, you will learn about the most important genAI concepts and create and use text chunks and embeddings to improve your RAG response.

SAP CodeJam events and quedadas (meetups) part of the roadshow (Register Now!)

Below is a listing of the SAP CodeJam events and quedadas (meetups) on the roadshow schedule:

Dates

CodeJam topic

Location

Registration

25 July

Getting started with Generative AI Hub on SAP AI Core

São Paulo, Brazil 🇧🇷

Link

25 July

Encontro SAP - Let's talk about Joule (meetup)

São Paulo, Brazil 🇧🇷

 

Link

4 August

ABAP Cloud & ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model

Lima, Peru 🇵🇪

Link

4 August

Quedada SAP - Let's talk about Joule (meetup)

Lima, Peru 🇵🇪

Link

5 August

Getting started with Generative AI Hub on SAP AI Core

Lima, Peru 🇵🇪

Link

7 August

ABAP Cloud & ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model

Mexico City, Mexico 🇲🇽

Link

7 August

Quedada SAP - Let's talk about Joule (meetup)

Mexico City, Mexico 🇲🇽

Link

8 August

Getting started with Generative AI Hub on SAP AI Core

Mexico City, Mexico 🇲🇽

Link

11 August

ABAP Cloud & ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model

Bogota, Colombia 🇨🇴

Link

11 August

Quedada SAP - Let's talk about Joule (meetup)

Bogota, Colombia 🇨🇴

Link

12 August

Getting started with Generative AI Hub on SAP AI Core

Bogota, Colombia 🇨🇴

Link

Make sure to register to secure your place. It is likely that the places available will go fast.

What if the CodeJam topics do not cover the SAP technology that you focus on? We've organised additional local meetups just to get together and have a chat. See you all somewhere in Latin America on the roadshow!

entry.title: Re: 🇲🇽 Getting started with Generative AI Hub on SAP AI Core (Mexico City, Mexico)
entry.content: Nos vemos en Agosto por alli 🙂
